'use strict'; /** * Creates a new URL by combining the specified URLs * * @param {string} baseURL The base URL * @param {string} relativeURL The relative URL * * @returns {string} The combined URL */ export default function combineURLs(baseURL, relativeURL) { return relativeURL ? baseURL.replace(/\/?\/$/, '') + '/' + relativeURL.replace(/^\/+/, '') : baseURL; }
